Runtime guard for D108 versioned byte backends.

## Import

```ts
import { hasStorageVersioned } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function hasStorageVersioned(backend: StorageBackend): backend is VersionedStorageBackend
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `backend` | `StorageBackend` | backend value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `backend is VersionedStorageBackend` value.

## Example

```ts
import { hasStorageVersioned } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```
